name: İki ömür
overview:
1994. Nail, Sahib and Rafael are three friends. Sahib and Rafael's wives are pregnant. Nail and his wife Mirvari have been longing for a child for a long time. Over time, this longing has turned into jealousy and envy. They make a plan together. The day Sahib and Sahar's child is born, Nail pays the doctor to switch their child with someone else.

It is already 2016. As a result of the events that have taken place, the secret that has been hidden for years slowly begins to be revealed and events change their course.

trailers.title: Anons İki Ömür serialı 26 dekabr 1-ci gün 22:00 da Xəzər tv-də
